clusters.name: llm_as_workload
clusters.description: LLM is the managed workload (resource allocation for LLM serving), not the decision-maker.
example_titles: A QoE-Driven Personalized Incentive Mechanism Design for AIGC Services in Resource-Constrained Edge Networks
WDMoE: Wireless Distributed Mixture of Experts for Large Language Models
LEAF: A Lightweight Edge Agent Framework with Expert SLMs for the Industrial Internet of Things

clusters.name: classic_rl_marl_no_llm
clusters.description: RL/MARL for resource management without LLM-driven reasoning loop.
example_titles: Multi-agent-Driven Dual-Layer Serverless Adaptive Ensemble Inference Method
Dynamic Priority-Aware Task Offloading with Two-Stage Multi-Agent Optimization in Multi-AAV Assisted MEC
A Digital Twin-Assisted Multi-agent Task Offloading Method with Priority Scheduling in Vehicular Edge Networks

clusters.name: medical_nlp_optimization
clusters.description: LLM inference optimization (medical NLP, healthcare) without RM or agent loop.
example_titles: Bridging the performance gap: systematic optimization of local LLMs for Japanese medical PHI extraction

clusters.name: llm_augmented_non_agentic
clusters.description: LLM or GenAI as feature/augmentation in RL/optimization, not autonomous agent loop.
example_titles: Energy-Efficient RSMA-Enabled Low-Altitude MEC Optimization via Generative AI-Enhanced Deep Reinforcement Learning
UAV-Assisted Task Offloading and Resource Allocation in Internet of Vehicles: An Integration of Digital Twin and Generative AI
HybridRAG-Based LLM Agents for Low-Carbon Optimization in Low-Altitude Economy Networks

clusters.name: rag_code_generation_support
clusters.description: RAG-enhanced code generation or LLM for static support tasks (not RM closed-loop).
example_titles: AutoML-Pipeline: A RAG-Enhanced Code Generation Framework With Pre-Validation for Cloud-Native Machine Learning Workflows

clusters.name: fault_diagnosis_llm
clusters.description: LLM fine-tuning for offline fault diagnosis; not agentic RM loop.
example_titles: Local self-verified chain-of-thought and preference alignment: a two-stage ReVCoT-DPO fine-tuning framework for system log fault diagnosis

clusters.name: agentic_llm_rm_core
clusters.description: LLM-based agentic loop for resource management (scheduling, allocation, offloading decisions).
example_titles: Large Language Model-based QoS-aware Resource Allocation for Multi-UAV Cooperative Edge Computing Networks
Toward 6G Edge Intelligence: Lightweight LLMs for Intent-Driven Network Automation
LLM-Aided Prediction and RL-Based Optimization for Secure Communications in Low-Altitude Economy Networks

clusters.name: iot_generative_ai_non_agentic
clusters.description: Generative AI in IoT/Metaverse/communication context without agentic RM.
example_titles: Enhancing Metaverse Fidelity and Freshness via GAI-aided Semantic Communication in Low-Altitude IoT Networks
